overview: A hyper-premium cinematic digital flagship for COFFEE DOZE, an artisanal café in Pratap Nagar, Jaipur. Built as a luxury brand experience with editorial storytelling, immersive animations, and conversion-optimized design.
features: Cinematic hero with parallax and glassmorphism navbar
Interactive multi-tab menu with Quick Add cart
Masonry gallery with hover gold shimmer overlays
Auto-scrolling testimonial carousel with star ratings
Full conversion layer with District, Swiggy, Zomato, and WhatsApp CTAs
Mobile sticky action bar for Call, WhatsApp, and Order
Schema.org LocalBusiness SEO with local keywords
Luxury design: Deep Espresso, Champagne Cream, Brushed Gold palette
